title: Mace Enchantment Nerf
description: Nerfs Mace enchants enough to be viable in PVP
body:
This simple datapack removes the Density, Wind Burst, Breach, Bane of Arthropods and Smite enchantments from Maces to make them more balanced in PVP situations.

**Only Works in 1.21.5 or above, due to the command structure being different, so I can't backport it either.**

Report any bugs or issues in my discord.
